notes: Runtime remains fallback_only by default: the real dispatch path is linked only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature and armed only by the opt-in RXGD_CAP_LUMINANCE_REAL_PASS flag.

The canonical artifacts/ paths carry the texture-capable hlsl_bridge workaround package: a DXC cs_6_0 DXIL container (validated by dxv, produced_by=dxc, HLSL source sha256=7a35a7f9ec14704d7e27d596f035844ef04b33d929b9e8f43788a7f746af7599), the Rurix-owned RTS0 root signature serialized by rurixc::binding_layout::serialize_rts0 (28-byte root constants + SRV t0 + UAV u0), and the rurixc-emitted src/lib_texture.rx descriptor layout with per-slot texture2d/rwtexture2d binding kinds.

This canonical switch is the owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance exception (texture_artifact_provenance_policy.json, policy_ready=true): the artifact is runtime-mappable but NOT rurix_owned; a rurixc-owned texture-capable compile still requires a patched llc that supports llvm.dx.resource.load.texture.2d.

The kernel math mirrors src/lib_texture.rx level-0 reduction (8x8 tile, arithmetic mean, partial-tile divisor); level-0 parity is CPU-proven in math_parity_evidence.json (status=pending_gpu_dispatch: GPU observation pending a real dispatch).

The final-level write_luminance variant (clamp(min,max) + EMA prev + (cur-prev)*exposure_adjust) already has a DXV-pass DXIL container at artifacts/hlsl_bridge/luminance_reduce_level_write_luminance.dxil; it is NOT yet part of the canonical package.
The historical raw-buffer segment 3a fixture is retained at artifacts/raw_buffer_historical/ with its own evidence in offline_compile_evidence_raw_buffer.json.
See hlsl_bridge_compile_evidence.json for the full stage A2 compile/validate/rts0 command evidence.
known_gaps: no EMA feedback (prev + (cur-prev)*exposure_adjust) in the canonical base variant; the write_luminance variant (clamp+EMA) already has a DXV-pass DXIL at artifacts/hlsl_bridge/luminance_reduce_level_write_luminance.dxil but is not canonical yet
no final-level WRITE_LUMINANCE clamp/min/max gating in the canonical base variant
level-0 only; Godot native uses ceil(log_8(max_dim)) levels
GPU-side math parity observation pending a real dispatch (math_parity_evidence.json)
